amountMustBePositive.title: Invalid Amount
amountMustBePositive.message: Lock amount must be greater than zero.
amountMustBePositive.recovery: Enter a positive amount to continue.

unlockMustBeFuture.title: Invalid Unlock Date
unlockMustBeFuture.message: Unlock date must be in the future.

stillLocked.title: Lock Not Expired
stillLocked.message: This lock hasn't reached its unlock date yet.
stillLocked.recovery: Check back on the unlock date shown on the lock card.

alreadyWithdrawn.title: Already Withdrawn
alreadyWithdrawn.message: Tokens have already been withdrawn from this lock.

canOnlyExtend.title: Invalid Extension Date
canOnlyExtend.message: New date must be after the current unlock date.

lockDurationTooLong.title: Lock Duration Too Long
lockDurationTooLong.recovery: Choose an unlock date within 10 years from today.

insufficientBalance.title: Insufficient Balance
insufficientBalance.message: You don't have enough tokens to lock this amount.
insufficientBalance.recovery: Reduce the amount or add funds to your wallet.

wrongNetwork.title: Wrong Network
wrongNetwork.message: Your wallet is connected to the wrong network.
wrongNetwork.recovery: Switch to the correct network in Freighter settings.

userRejected.title: Transaction Cancelled
userRejected.message: You cancelled the transaction in your wallet.
userRejected.recovery: Click the button again when you're ready to proceed.

timeout.title: Transaction Timed Out
timeout.message: The transaction took too long to confirm.
timeout.recovery: Check Stellar Expert for the transaction status.

unknown.title: Something Went Wrong
unknown.recovery: Please try again. If this persists, contact support.
